meta.title: Res Publica
meta.description: A civic organization for democracy, responsibility, dialogue, research, and public participation.

hero.title: The public matter belongs to everyone.
hero.lede: Res Publica connects democracy, responsibility, and research — creating spaces where dialogue becomes participation.

items.title: Democracy
items.text: We strengthen democratic institutions and practices through education, analysis, and public debate.

items.title: Dialogue
items.text: We bring people with different perspectives together — respectfully, openly, and as equals.

items.title: Research
items.text: We work evidence-based: independent research is the foundation of our positions and projects.

platformFoundation.heading: Platform Foundation
platformFoundation.intro: Res Publica is becoming a full civic platform. The areas below already have a foundation implemented at the architecture and module level — most are not yet connected to a public interface. This is foundation work in progress, not a list of finished features.

items.title: Membership
items.text: Module layer implemented — lifecycle, tiers, and integrations; frontend not yet connected.

items.title: Community
items.text: Module layer implemented — participation stages and consent-based interaction; prepared for future frontend integration.

items.title: CRM / Partners
items.text: Module layer implemented — donor and partner relationships, including conflict-of-interest review, as a governance foundation.

items.title: Projects
items.text: Already visible publicly today; deeper platform integration in progress.

items.title: Events
items.text: Already visible publicly today; registration and event-scoped Q&A implemented as a module-level foundation.

items.title: Learning
items.text: Foundation in progress — not yet implemented as its own module.

items.title: Publications
items.text: Already visible publicly today; editorial workflow implemented as a separate module-level foundation.

items.title: Research
items.text: Already visible publicly today as part of our work.

items.title: Governance / EAO
items.text: Internal governance foundation in progress, separate from public-facing features.

cta.title: Take part.
cta.text: Public participation begins with a first step. Write to us.

partners.title: Partners
partners.lede: We work with organizations that share our values.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Write to us — we usually reply within a few days.

form.name: Name
form.successText: Your message has been recorded. We will get back to you.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

home.notFoundText: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lede: Concrete initiatives that make participation possible.

research.title: Research
research.lede: Independent analysis as the foundation of our work.

publications.title: Publications
publications.lede: Reports, papers, and statements — freely available.

events.title: Events
events.lede: Places of dialogue: upcoming and past dates.

footer.tagline: For democracy, responsibility, and public participation.

search.title: Search
search.lede: Search news, projects, research, publications, and events.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.text: News from Res Publica — occasional, ad-free, unsubscribe anytime.
